framing: scripted golden traversal replay — a recorded walk played back, not emergence and not an effect (ADR §0 honest framing)
sampling_rules: 1. the first and last physics row are always keyframes
2. the last physics row of every cognition tick (agent_tick) is a keyframe
3. both rows bracketing a position-derived zone change are keyframes
5. physics_tick_index strictly increasing, adjacent gap <= K, adjacent spatial delta <= 2.0 m, wrapped yaw delta <= pi
6. every emitted pose is echoed from the raw row, never recomputed
visit_sequence_source: recomputed from keyframe (x, z) via contracts.geometry.locate_zone; the committed zone label is never read
